human_explanation: Two people, one in a white shirt and one in a blue shirt, are riding a bicycle in a pedestrian area where cycling is not allowed.

segments.ai_explanation: All frames show normal pedestrian and cyclist activity, with individuals walking and cycling calmly on the path.

scores.justification: The AI fails to identify the anomaly of two people riding a bicycle where cycling is not allowed, instead describing the scene as normal. It lacks specific details like the clothing of the individuals and misses the restriction violation aspect. The fluency is relatively good, as the sentences are clear and coherent.
